title: Kenyan Citrus Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful and refreshing Kenyan-inspired chicken tagine with a burst of citrus and aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook, stirring occasionally, until fragrant, about 4 minutes.
Add the cumin, coriander, and cayenne pepper. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the chopped onions, lemon juice, orange juice, and tagine spice mix. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then cover the tagine and cook until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened, about 20-25 minutes.
Serve the chicken hot, garnished with fresh citrus wedges and herbs, if desired.
